slots.grader_notes: All three high dimensions land cleanly. Headline reads at 40px in the thumbnail test; hook-first ordering confirmed by showing the main payoff moment on slot 1; pricing claim in the copy matches REVENUE_OPS.md v1.2. One-idea: the framing is tight. Brand tokens matched against state/theme.tokens.json commit 7f3a. ASO keyword 'task planner' visible in headline and 'focus timer' in sub-copy. Emotional beat: decisiveness confirmed by independent reviewer. Score reflects a strong deck.

Legibility meets threshold at 60px but not 40px — secondary text is tight on small thumbs. Truthfulness strong: all visible UI exists in the shipped build, pricing matches. ASO keyword reinforcement is weak; only a secondary keyword appears in body copy, not headline. Emotional beat is present but subtle. Recommend copy pass to surface primary keyword in headline before v2.

Legibility below threshold — headline font size drops below 14sp equivalent at 60px thumbnail. Hook-first and truthfulness both meet floor. Weighted score 0.59 does not clear 0.65 threshold. Founder override filed: v1.0 conversion data needed before redesign investment. Will revisit in post-launch PPO cycle.

override.reason: Shipping with current legibility score; will revisit in v1.1 after first conversion data arrives.

slots.grader_notes: Japanese deck reviewed by native-speaker contractor. Thumbnail legibility confirmed at 40px — katakana headline is 24sp equivalent and distinguishable. Hook ordering matches en-US master deck. Truthfulness: all claims re-checked against ja App Store pricing. Localization: RTL not applicable; copy reviewed by native speaker, no awkward phrases. One minor stylistic note: the sub-copy in slot-1 could be tightened by removing the formal honorific but it reads naturally at the target demographic.
